title: Original Type Icons (Cobblemon)
description: Original Type Icons for the Cobblemon mod.
body:
Replaces the Cobblemon type icons with the versions from Pokémon GO, Pokémon Sword, and Pokémon Shield.

![Type Icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DjNGwrk6/images/12001aa9436bfec6604bcc8ad48b11518ad49f7b.png)

![Type Icons in the Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DjNGwrk6/images/70296a3c8b05a6e8fa26cc514e61c60ef88acc71.png)
